title: Proceedings contemplated by Part exclusive
doc_html:
§1294.  Proceedings contemplated by Part exclusive

No proceedings in respect to the authorization and execution of any such lease shall be necessary except such as are contemplated by this Part.

Acts 1954, No. 571, §4.  Amended by Acts 1954, No. 712, §4.
doc_text:
§1294.  Proceedings contemplated by Part exclusive
No proceedings in respect to the authorization and execution of any such lease shall be necessary except such as are contemplated by this Part.
Acts 1954, No. 571, §4.  Amended by Acts 1954, No. 712, §4.
